button.description:
## Token Mapping

| Propriété CSS | Token | Résolu | État |
|---|---|---|---|
| background | --component-button-bg-default | var(--semantic-color-bg-brand) | default |
| background | --component-button-bg-hover | var(--semantic-color-bg-brand-hover) | :hover |
| background | --component-button-bg-active | var(--semantic-color-bg-brand-active) | :active |
| background | --component-button-bg-disabled | var(--semantic-color-bg-disabled) | :disabled |
| color | --component-button-color-label | var(--semantic-color-text-on-brand) | default |
| color | --component-button-color-label-disabled | var(--semantic-color-text-disabled) | :disabled |
| border-color | --component-button-border-color | var(--semantic-color-border-default) | default (outline variant) |
| border-color | --component-button-border-color-focus | var(--semantic-color-border-emphasis) | :focus-visible |
| border-radius | --component-button-radius | var(--semantic-radius-md) | all |
| padding-inline | --component-button-padding-x | var(--semantic-spacing-md) | all |
| padding-block | --component-button-padding-y | var(--semantic-spacing-sm) | all |
| font-size | --component-button-font-size | var(--semantic-typography-body-md-size) | all |
| font-weight | --component-button-font-weight | var(--semantic-typography-body-md-weight) | all |
| gap | --component-button-gap | var(--semantic-spacing-xs) | all |
| outline-offset | --component-button-focus-outline-offset | var(--semantic-spacing-xxs) | :focus-visible |
| background | --component-button-ghost-bg-hover | var(--semantic-color-bg-brand-subtle-hover) | ghost :hover |
| opacity | — | 0.5 | :disabled |

input.description:
## Token Mapping

| Propriété CSS | Token | Résolu | État |
|---|---|---|---|
| background | --component-input-bg | var(--semantic-color-surface-default) | default |
| background | --component-input-bg-disabled | var(--semantic-color-surface-muted) | :disabled |
| color | --component-input-color-text | var(--semantic-color-content-default) | default |
| color | --component-input-color-placeholder | var(--semantic-color-content-subtle) | placeholder |
| color | --component-input-color-text-disabled | var(--semantic-color-content-disabled) | :disabled |
| border-color | --component-input-border-color | var(--semantic-color-border-default) | default |
| border-color | --component-input-border-color-hover | var(--semantic-color-border-emphasis) | :hover |
| border-color | --component-input-border-color-focus | var(--semantic-color-border-emphasis) | :focus-visible |
| border-color | --component-input-border-color-error | var(--semantic-color-border-danger) | error |
| border-color | --component-input-border-color-disabled | var(--semantic-color-border-subtle) | :disabled |
| border-width | --component-input-border-width | var(--semantic-border-width-sm) | default |
| border-width | --component-input-border-width-focus | var(--semantic-border-width-md) | :focus-visible |
| border-radius | --component-input-radius | var(--semantic-radius-md) | default |
| padding-block | --component-input-padding-y | var(--semantic-spacing-2) | default |
| padding-inline | --component-input-padding-x | var(--semantic-spacing-3) | default |
| font-size | --component-input-font-size | var(--semantic-typography-body-md-size) | default |
| font-family | --component-input-font-family | var(--semantic-typography-font-family-base) | default |
| line-height | --component-input-line-height | var(--semantic-typography-body-md-line-height) | default |
| gap | --component-input-gap | var(--semantic-spacing-2) | default |
| outline | --component-input-focus-ring | var(--semantic-color-border-emphasis) | :focus-visible |
| color (label) | --component-input-label-color | var(--semantic-color-content-default) | default |
| color (helper) | --component-input-helper-color | var(--semantic-color-content-subtle) | default |
| color (error msg) | --component-input-error-color | var(--semantic-color-content-danger) | error |
| font-size (label) | --component-input-label-font-size | var(--semantic-typography-body-sm-size) | default |
| font-size (helper) | --component-input-helper-font-size | var(--semantic-typography-body-sm-size) | default |
| min-width | --component-input-min-width | var(--semantic-sizing-input-min) | default |
| icon color | --component-input-icon-color | var(--semantic-color-content-subtle) | default |
| icon size | --component-input-icon-size | var(--semantic-sizing-icon-md) | default |

card.description:
## Token Mapping

| Propriété CSS | Token | Résolu | État |
|---|---|---|---|
| background | --component-card-bg | var(--semantic-color-surface-default) | default |
| background | --component-card-bg-hover | var(--semantic-color-surface-raised) | hover |
| border-color | --component-card-border-color | var(--semantic-color-border-default) | default |
| border-color | --component-card-border-color-hover | var(--semantic-color-border-emphasis) | hover |
| border-radius | --component-card-radius | var(--semantic-radius-md) | all |
| border-width | --component-card-border-width | var(--semantic-border-width-default) | all |
| padding | --component-card-padding | var(--semantic-spacing-md) | default |
| padding | --component-card-padding-sm | var(--semantic-spacing-sm) | compact |
| padding | --component-card-padding-lg | var(--semantic-spacing-lg) | spacious |
| box-shadow | --component-card-shadow | var(--semantic-shadow-sm) | default |
| box-shadow | --component-card-shadow-hover | var(--semantic-shadow-md) | hover |
| box-shadow | --component-card-shadow-elevated | var(--semantic-shadow-lg) | elevated |
| color (title) | --component-card-title-color | var(--semantic-color-text-primary) | default |
| color (body) | --component-card-body-color | var(--semantic-color-text-secondary) | default |
| color (meta) | --component-card-meta-color | var(--semantic-color-text-subtle) | default |
| font-size (title) | --component-card-title-font-size | var(--semantic-typography-heading-sm-size) | default |
| font-weight (title) | --component-card-title-font-weight | var(--semantic-typography-heading-sm-weight) | default |
| font-size (body) | --component-card-body-font-size | var(--semantic-typography-body-md-size) | default |
| font-size (meta) | --component-card-meta-font-size | var(--semantic-typography-body-sm-size) | default |
| gap (inner) | --component-card-gap | var(--semantic-spacing-sm) | default |
| outline | --semantic-color-border-emphasis | — | focus-visible |
| opacity | — | 0.5 | disabled |
| transition | --component-card-transition | var(--semantic-motion-duration-fast) | interactive |
| color (interactive title) | --component-card-interactive-title-color | var(--semantic-color-text-link) | hover (interactive) |
| media (image) aspect-ratio | --component-card-media-ratio | — | all |

badge.description:
## Token Mapping

| Propriété CSS | Token | Résolu | État |
|---|---|---|---|
| background-color (default/neutral) | --badge-color-background-neutral | → --semantic-color-background-neutral | ✅ |
| background-color (success) | --badge-color-background-success | → --semantic-color-background-success | ✅ |
| background-color (warning) | --badge-color-background-warning | → --semantic-color-background-warning | ✅ |
| background-color (danger) | --badge-color-background-danger | → --semantic-color-background-danger | ✅ |
| background-color (info) | --badge-color-background-info | → --semantic-color-background-info | ✅ |
| color (default/neutral) | --badge-color-text-neutral | → --semantic-color-text-neutral | ✅ |
| color (success) | --badge-color-text-success | → --semantic-color-text-success | ✅ |
| color (warning) | --badge-color-text-warning | → --semantic-color-text-warning | ✅ |
| color (danger) | --badge-color-text-danger | → --semantic-color-text-danger | ✅ |
| color (info) | --badge-color-text-info | → --semantic-color-text-info | ✅ |
| border-radius | --badge-border-radius | → --semantic-border-radius-full | ✅ |
| padding-inline | --badge-spacing-padding-inline | → --semantic-spacing-2 | ✅ |
| padding-block | --badge-spacing-padding-block | → --semantic-spacing-1 | ✅ |
| font-size | --badge-typography-font-size | → --semantic-typography-label-xs-size | ✅ |
| font-weight | --badge-typography-font-weight | → --semantic-typography-label-xs-weight | ✅ |
| line-height | --badge-typography-line-height | → --semantic-typography-label-xs-line-height | ✅ |
| gap (icon + label) | --badge-spacing-gap | → --semantic-spacing-1 | ✅ |
| outline (focus-visible) | --semantic-color-border-emphasis | — | ✅ |
| opacity (:disabled) | --semantic-state-disabled-opacity | → 0.5 | ✅ |
| border (outline variant) | --badge-color-border-neutral | → --semantic-color-border-neutral | ✅ |
| border (outline/success) | --badge-color-border-success | → --semantic-color-border-success | ✅ |
| border (outline/warning) | --badge-color-border-warning | → --semantic-color-border-warning | ✅ |
| border (outline/danger) | --badge-color-border-danger | → --semantic-color-border-danger | ✅ |
| border (outline/info) | --badge-color-border-info | → --semantic-color-border-info | ✅ |
| dot size | --badge-dot-size | — | ⚠️ MANQUANT |
